task_completion.description: Successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard or home screen of ADAudit Plus is visible, indicating the agent successfully bypassed the login page.
The 'Admin' tab in the top navigation menu is clicked, active, or highlighted.
The 'Logon Settings' configuration page is visible in the main content area of the application.

task_completion.description: Enabled Single Sign-on with Active Directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox labeled 'Enable Single Sign-on with Active Directory' (or similar) is checked.
The radio button or selection option for 'NTLMv2 Authentication' is actively selected.

integrity.description: The agent used Microsoft Edge to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Edge browser interface (tabs, address bar) is visible containing the application.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus software
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface, not a text editor, mockup, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No Command Prompt, PowerShell, or terminal windows are open and being used to configure the settings via scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure the Logon Settings by ensuring 'Single Sign-on with Active Directory' is enabled (checked) and the authentication method is explicitly set to 'NTLMv2 Authentication'.
